name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-93
title: Post-consolidation cleanup: remove references to retired features (workspace-tree.py, spec.md, tests) and rabbit-spec→rabbit-feature-spec rename
description:
Post-consolidation audit findings for rabbit-cage:

1. workspace-tree.py:74-77,85 hard-codes both rabbit-feature-scope and rabbit-spec in ANNOTATIONS/STRUCTURAL_DIRS — produces misleading workspace tree output. Either remove or mark as retired.
2. spec.md:404,423,466 still references 'rabbit-spec' skill name in narrative. Update to 'rabbit-feature-spec' (skill renamed as part of absorption).
3. test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-18-sync-check-aggregation.py:83 — enumerates retired features. Update or remove.
4. test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-22-cleanup.py:7,74 — same.
5. README.md:80 — example invocation references .claude/features/tdd-subagent/scripts/tdd-step.py (script moved to tdd-state-machine).
6. Add tdd-state-machine to ANNOTATIONS/STRUCTURAL_DIRS.
